---
title: "Protocol 2: Self-Prediction"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
params:
  data_path: "outputs/viz/default.parquet"
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
data_path = "outputs/viz/default.parquet"
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
from inspect_viz import Data
from inspect_viz.view import scores_by_factor
from inspect_viz.layout import hconcat

df = pd.read_parquet(data_path)

def plot_pair_for_n(n: int, pair: str, factor_labels: tuple, title: str, score_column: str = "score_headline_value"):
    """Generate a single scores_by_factor plot for a condition pair at given N."""
    filtered = df[(df["task_arg_n_turns"] == n) & (df["condition_pair"] == pair)]
    data = Data.from_dataframe(filtered)
    
    return scores_by_factor(
        data,
        factor="instruction_aligned",
        factor_labels=factor_labels,
        title=title,
        score_value=score_column,
        width=400,
    )

def plot_all_for_n(n: int, score_column: str = "score_instruction_following_value", metric_name: str = "Instruction Following"):
    """Generate all 3 factor plots for a given N value and metric."""
    value_plot = plot_pair_for_n(n, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), f"N={n}: Value Alignment ({metric_name})", score_column)
    factual_plot = plot_pair_for_n(n, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), f"N={n}: Truth Alignment ({metric_name})", score_column)
    neutral_plot = plot_pair_for_n(n, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), f"N={n}: Hint Effect ({metric_name})", score_column)
    return hconcat(value_plot, factual_plot, neutral_plot)
```

## Overview

Protocol 2 tests whether models can predict their own behavior before generating.

For each N value, we show 3 factor comparisons across 3 metrics:
- **Instruction Following**: Did actual output follow instruction (T)?
- **Prediction Accuracy**: Did prediction match actual output?
- **Prediction Instruction**: Did prediction follow instruction (T)?

# Metric: Instruction Following

## N = 1

```{python}
#| label: n1_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(1, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 2

```{python}
#| label: n2_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(2, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 3

```{python}
#| label: n3_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(3, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 5

```{python}
#| label: n5_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(5, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 7

```{python}
#| label: n7_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(7, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 10

```{python}
#| label: n10_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(10, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 15

```{python}
#| label: n15_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(15, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 20

```{python}
#| label: n20_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(20, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 25

```{python}
#| label: n25_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(25, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 30

```{python}
#| label: n30_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(30, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 40

```{python}
#| label: n40_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(40, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

## N = 50

```{python}
#| label: n50_if
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(50, "score_instruction_following_value", "Instruction Following")
```

# Metric: Prediction Accuracy

## N = 1

```{python}
#| label: n1_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(1, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 2

```{python}
#| label: n2_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(2, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 3

```{python}
#| label: n3_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(3, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 5

```{python}
#| label: n5_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(5, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 7

```{python}
#| label: n7_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(7, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 10

```{python}
#| label: n10_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(10, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 15

```{python}
#| label: n15_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(15, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 20

```{python}
#| label: n20_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(20, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 25

```{python}
#| label: n25_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(25, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 30

```{python}
#| label: n30_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(30, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 40

```{python}
#| label: n40_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(40, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

## N = 50

```{python}
#| label: n50_pa
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(50, "score_prediction_accuracy_value", "Prediction Accuracy")
```

# Metric: Prediction Instruction

## N = 1

```{python}
#| label: n1_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(1, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 2

```{python}
#| label: n2_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(2, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 3

```{python}
#| label: n3_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(3, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 5

```{python}
#| label: n5_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(5, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 7

```{python}
#| label: n7_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(7, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 10

```{python}
#| label: n10_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(10, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 15

```{python}
#| label: n15_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(15, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 20

```{python}
#| label: n20_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(20, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 25

```{python}
#| label: n25_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(25, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 30

```{python}
#| label: n30_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(30, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 40

```{python}
#| label: n40_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(40, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```

## N = 50

```{python}
#| label: n50_pi
#| echo: false
plot_all_for_n(50, "score_prediction_instruction_value", "Prediction Instruction")
```
